content.text:
GICC Goals and
Strategic Direction 
2021-2023

N.C. Geographic Information 
Coordinating Council

April 8, 2020

elements.caption: Presentation Title and Organization
elements.summary: Layout table containing the presentation title, organization name, date, and logo.

elements.alt: NC DIT Logo with connected nodes graphic

content.text: May Council Meeting – Discuss Goals and Strategic Direction
Tasking for Committees – Management and Operations Committee
August Council Meeting – Finalize and adopt

elements.alt: NCDIT logo with blue text and a branching nodes graphic.

content.text: Improve, expand, and support statewide geospatial data and applications.
Collaborate and conduct outreach for more integration of geospatial data in information technology for expanded benefits in the geospatial community in North Carolina.

elements.text: Goal 1.1. Promote free and open discovery of and access to geospatial data created and maintained by local governments.

content.text: Improved access to local government datasets
Promote the value of local data

elements.caption: Benefits and Actions for Goal 1.1
elements.summary: Table listing the benefit and corresponding action for Goal 1.1.

content.text: Goal 1: Improve, expand, and support statewide geospatial data and applications.

elements.text: Goal 1.2. Research solutions that maintain data sharing security to aid discovery and ease of access to geospatial data.

content.text: Improved access to currently security constrained data

elements.caption: Benefits and Actions for Goal 1.2
elements.summary: Table listing the benefit and corresponding action for Goal 1.2.

content.text: Goal 1: Improve, expand, and support statewide geospatial data and applications.

elements.text: Goal 1.3. Continue to support initiatives that compile and maintain statewide geospatial datasets that benefit the businesses and citizens of North Carolina.

elements.caption: Benefits and Actions for Goal 1.3
elements.summary: Table listing the benefit and corresponding action for Goal 1.3.

content.text: Goal 1: Improve, expand, and support statewide geospatial data and applications.

elements.text: Goal 1.4. Find solutions to make data sharing local-to- state more efficient to meet the needs of multiple statewide datasets and not place undue burden on local geospatial data managers.

content.text: Reduce redundant data requests and streamline processes

elements.caption: Benefits and Actions for Goal 1.4
elements.summary: Table listing the benefit and corresponding action for Goal 1.4.

content.text: Goal 1: Improve, expand, and support statewide geospatial data and applications.

elements.text: Goal 1.5. Request all state agencies to make the Council’s priority geospatial datasets discoverable and accessible through the NC OneMap Geospatial Portal.

content.text: Priority data accessible via NC OneMap
Prioritize datasets and define sharing policies

elements.caption: Benefits and Actions for Goal 1.5
elements.summary: Table listing the benefit and corresponding action for Goal 1.5.

content.text: Goal 1: Improve, expand, and support statewide geospatial data and applications.

elements.text: Goal 1.6. Promote geospatial metadata for standard documentation.

elements.caption: Benefits and Actions for Goal 1.6
elements.summary: Table listing the benefit and corresponding action for Goal 1.6.

content.text: Goal 1: Improve, expand, and support statewide geospatial data and applications.

elements.text: Goal 1.7. Support applications that derive business value from geospatial data assets and analytics.

content.text: Identify requirements and define technical solutions
Value added applications from existing investments

elements.caption: Benefits and Actions for Goal 1.7
elements.summary: Table listing the benefits and corresponding actions for Goal 1.7.

content.text: Goal 1: Improve, expand, and support statewide geospatial data and applications.

elements.text: Goal 2.1. Identify opportunities to collaborate on GIS solutions in state departments and divisions not directly represented on the Council to add value to state business processes.

content.text: Collaborate with non‐GICC State agencies to add value.
Identify needs and opportunities; optimize GIS and IT resources.

elements.caption: Benefits and Actions for Goal 2.1
elements.summary: Table listing the benefit and corresponding action for Goal 2.1.

content.text: Goal 2. Collaborate and conduct outreach for more integration of geospatial data in information technology for expanded benefits in the geospatial community in North Carolina.

sections.title: Goal 2.2. Identify opportunities to collaborate on geospatial data and technical solutions on a regional basis, engaging councils of government, educational institutions, metropolitan planning organizations, and rural planning organizations.

elements.caption: Goal 2.2 Actions and Benefits
elements.summary: Table outlining the benefits and actions for collaborating on geospatial data regionally.

content.text: Goal 2. Collaborate and conduct outreach for more integration of geospatial data in information technology for expanded benefits in the geospatial community in North Carolina.

sections.title: Goal 2.3. Reach out to jurisdictions with the least resources to find ways to add value with geospatial data and applications.

content.text: Assist Local Governments in statewide initiatives
Identify needs and practical ways to assist

elements.caption: Goal 2.3 Actions and Benefits
elements.summary: Table outlining the benefits and actions for assisting jurisdictions with the least resources.

content.text: Goal 2. Collaborate and conduct outreach for more integration of geospatial data in information technology for expanded benefits in the geospatial community in North Carolina.

sections.title: Goal 2.4. Increase awareness and adoption of Council initiatives and priorities through outreach and education

content.text: Engage the GIS community at the local, state, and federal level to promote GICC initiatives
Share opportunities for collaboration, promote initiatives, promote the value of GIS

elements.caption: Goal 2.4 Actions and Benefits
elements.summary: Table outlining the benefits and actions for increasing awareness and adoption of Council initiatives.

content.text: Goal 2. Collaborate and conduct outreach for more integration of geospatial data in information technology for expanded benefits in the geospatial community in North Carolina.
